fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that Islam would spread across the earth.
fulfillment: Islam reached every continent.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that the Muslims would conquer Persia.
fulfillment: The Persian Empire fell to the Muslims.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that the Muslims would conquer Roman lands.
fulfillment: Byzantine territories fell to the Muslims.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that Jerusalem would be conquered.
fulfillment: Jerusalem was conquered during the caliphate of ʿUmar ibn al-Khattab.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that a major plague would occur after Jerusalem was conquered.
fulfillment: The plague of ʿAmwas occurred in Syria.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that wealth would become abundant among the Muslims.
fulfillment: This happened after the conquests of Persia and Rome.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that people would struggle to find someone willing to accept charity.
fulfillment: This occurred during periods of great Muslim prosperity.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that Kisra's kingdom would be torn apart.
fulfillment: The Sassanid Persian Empire collapsed.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that the treasures of Kisra and Caesar would be spent in Allah's cause.
fulfillment: Their wealth entered Muslim lands after the conquests.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that ʿAmmar ibn Yasir would be killed by a rebellious group.
fulfillment: ʿAmmar was killed at Siffin.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that Hasan ibn ʿAli would reconcile two major groups of Muslims.
fulfillment: Hasan gave up political power to end conflict between Muslims.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ told Fatimah that she would be the first of his family to join him after death.
fulfillment: Fatimah died shortly after the Prophet ﷺ.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold the appearance of the Khawarij.
fulfillment: The Khawarij appeared during the time of ʿAli.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ described the Khawarij before they appeared.
fulfillment: Their traits matched exactly what he described.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that false prophets would appear after him.
fulfillment: Many false claimants to prophethood appeared.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that thirty great liars would claim prophethood.
fulfillment: False prophets appeared throughout Islamic history.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that his Ummah would divide.
fulfillment: Many sects and groups appeared after him.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that a group from his Ummah would remain upon the truth.
fulfillment: Ahl al-Sunnah remained through every era.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that trust would be lost.
fulfillment: Betrayal, corruption, and dishonesty became widespread.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that leadership would be given to unqualified people.
fulfillment: This is visibly common in politics, institutions, and society.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that barefoot shepherds would compete in constructing tall buildings.
fulfillment: Former desert regions now compete in skyscrapers and luxury towers.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that people would compete in decorating mosques.
fulfillment: Many mosques became places of architectural competition.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that time would feel as if it passes quickly.
fulfillment: People commonly feel that years, months, and days pass rapidly.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that knowledge would decrease.
fulfillment: True religious knowledge became less common among the masses.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that ignorance would become widespread.
fulfillment: Ignorance of religion and basic truth is widespread today.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that drinking alcohol would become widespread.
fulfillment: Alcohol became globally normalized.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that zina would become widespread.
fulfillment: Sexual immorality became public, normalized, and commercialized.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that musical instruments would be made lawful by some people.
fulfillment: Music became normalized even among many Muslims.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that riba would become widespread.
fulfillment: Interest-based finance dominates the global economy.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that people would consume riba openly.
fulfillment: Interest is built into loans, banking, mortgages, and credit systems.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that killing would increase.
fulfillment: Mass killing, wars, murders, and bloodshed became common.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that the killer would not know why he killed, and the killed would not know why he was killed.
fulfillment: Senseless violence and chaotic killing became common.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that earthquakes would increase.
fulfillment: Earthquakes remain a repeated global sign and fear.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that trials would appear like pieces of a dark night.
fulfillment: Confusing ideological, political, and social trials continue to multiply.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that people would follow the ways of previous nations step by step.
fulfillment: Muslims adopted many practices and ideologies from non-Muslim civilizations.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that nations would invite one another against the Muslims.
fulfillment: Muslim lands were repeatedly invaded, divided, and exploited.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that Muslims would become numerous but weak like foam on the sea.
fulfillment: Muslims became large in number but politically and militarily weak.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that love of the world and hatred of death would weaken the Muslims.
fulfillment: Materialism and fear of sacrifice became widespread.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that women would be clothed yet naked.
fulfillment: Revealing fashion became widespread while still being called clothing.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that women would appear with heads like the humps of camels.
fulfillment: High, exaggerated hairstyles and head-covering styles appeared.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that markets would become close together.
fulfillment: Trade and shopping became globally connected and instantly accessible.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that commerce would become widespread.
fulfillment: Buying, selling, branding, and marketplaces dominate modern life.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that writing would become widespread.
fulfillment: Literacy, publishing, texting, and digital writing spread globally.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that sudden death would become common.
fulfillment: Sudden deaths from violence, accidents, and medical events are common.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that people would greet only those they know.
fulfillment: Social warmth declined, and greetings became selective.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that lying would spread.
fulfillment: Deception, propaganda, fake news, and false testimony became widespread.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that false testimony would become common.
fulfillment: Lying in courts, business, media, and public life became normal.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that people would sever family ties.
fulfillment: Family breakdown and neglect of relatives became widespread.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that stinginess would be placed in people's hearts.
fulfillment: Extreme greed and selfishness became common.

fact: The Prophet ﷺ foretold that a fire would emerge from the land of Hijaz and illuminate the necks of camels in Busra.
fulfillment: A major volcanic fire occurred near Madinah in 654 AH / 1256 CE.
